SELECT DISTINCT ?coach ?coachLabel WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P1380 wd:Q140148 .
  ?team p:P265 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P265 ?coach .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {

  ?playerTeam wdt:P1380 wd:Q140148 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?coach rdfs:label ?coachLabel
    FILTER(lang(?coachLabel) = "en")
  }
}
